title: La symphonie fantastique
writer: André du Dognon, Charles Exbrayat, Jean-Pierre Feydeau
actors: Renée Saint-Cyr, Lise Delamare, Jean-Louis Barrault
plot: Biographical romance about the great composer Hector Berlioz, someone whom the French, during their WWII occupation by the Nazis, could look back proudly on.
